name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-12
title: Document .rabbit-scope-active requirement: spec-update and impl dispatches must go through dispatch scripts, never direct Agent call

history.note: Already documented: CLAUDE.md workflow-rules mandate dispatch via dispatch-feature-edit.sh, and rabbit-feature-touch SKILL.md explicitly states the main session must not call Agent directly for spec-update or impl steps. Adding redundant documentation would drift from single-source-of-truth principle.
